violations.text: Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (Chest Freezer) was observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The floor by the entrance of the kitchen area, and behind dishwasher has an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to continue with increased pest control. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all areas with droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the cafetria and storage rooms on the side of the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must continue with increased pest control. Establishment must clean any and all droppings. Establishment must have full Evalution of building conducted by licensed pest control. Pest control reports must be available to inspector for Re-Inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2025
The handle on the chest freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2025

Milk chest #4 was observed holding an ambient temperature of 43 DF. Establishment is to get milk chest serviced and not store any TCS foods in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. That gasket on milk chest #3 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The floor in the kitchen area by the dish machine is in poor repair. The floor by the back door is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
